tools.description: Work tracker for monitoring agent activity, audits, ralph chains, and live work feeds

tools.description: Local automation gateway for executing commands, managing nodes, and orchestrating agent workflows

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.description: Anthropic's coding assistant for software development, code review, and technical analysis tasks

tools.name: Perplexity Pro
tools.description: AI-powered search engine for deep research, fact-checking, and staying current on tech developments

tools.name: Cursor IDE
tools.description: AI-first code editor with built-in Claude integration for rapid development and refactoring

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.description: Voice synthesis platform for creating AI voiceovers, narration, and audio content

tools.name: Gamma.app
tools.description: AI-powered presentation and document creation for pitch decks and research summaries

tools.name: Content Pipeline
tools.description: Kanban-style content pipeline for tracking video ideas from concept to upload

tools.name: Performance Analyzer
tools.description: Analyze YouTube video performance with sortable tables and trend charts

tools.name: Content Brief Generator
tools.description: Generate structured content briefs from outlier video analysis

tools.name: Minecraft Map Scraper
tools.description: Search and browse Minecraft maps with bookmark functionality

tools.name: Storyboard Generator
tools.description: Browser-based storyboard creator with scene breakdowns, timing estimates, and export to JSON/Markdown. Generates visual storyboards for video planning.

tools.name: Voiceover Generator
tools.description: Browser-based voiceover script generator with timing, delivery notes, and multiple voice style presets. Exports to TXT/JSON for recording sessions.

tools.name: Seedance 2.0
tools.description: ByteDance's AI video generation platform with native audio capabilities. 1080p output, camera motion controls, and Lip Sync feature for talking head videos.

tools.name: Kling 3.0
tools.description: Kuaishou's advanced AI video generator with 1080p resolution, 10-second clips, and character consistency features. Strong motion quality and physics simulation.

tools.name: ViewStats Pro
tools.description: MrBeast's YouTube analytics platform for finding outlier videos. Identifies viral content patterns, channel performance metrics, and trending opportunities.

tools.name: Google Veo 3
tools.description: Google's AI video generator with native audio generation. Creates clips with synchronized sound effects and background audio. Strong motion quality and physics simulation.

tools.name: OpenAI Sora 2
tools.description: OpenAI's latest video generation model with hyperreal motion and native audio. New dedicated app for video creation with improved physics and cinematic quality.

tools.name: Runway Gen-4
tools.description: Runway's newest video generation model with unprecedented accuracy in motion and scene consistency. Enhanced character consistency and camera controls for professional workflows.
